mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weak consumer spending, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 55% of triggered instances, or the signal shows no statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving sustained positive market returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, generating short-term positive momentum in equities.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 during late-cycle or recession regimes, or fails to beat baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity multiples and causing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in more than 60% of instances when the inflation threshold is breached, invalidating the tightening expectation channel.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth expands corporate earnings fundamentals, providing a direct positive driver for quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows no statistically significant correlation with 60-day forward returns (p > 0.10) across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent job growth and falling unemployment rates confirm robust labor market tightening, supporting consumer confidence and positive equity performance.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform baseline returns in walk-forward testing over 2-year windows, or interaction term loses significance.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side shocks and falling business revenues, triggering short-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: Negative industrial production changes do not precede negative 5-day returns more than 55% of the time, or IC drops below 0.02.
